title: News
content:
News

Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences

News

The 10th Steering Committee Meeting of the OPINA Project was held on December 19, 2024, at the Tuzla Campus of Istanbul Okan University.

20
						December

2024

The meeting began with the
opening speech of Prof. Dr. Semih Bilgen, the Senior Representative of Istanbul
Okan University for the OPINA Project. During the meeting, the project team
provided detailed presentations on the current progress of the project and the
software development processes. The meeting concluded with a Q&A and discussion
session, in which all stakeholders participated.
